{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | latitude = 33.0158 | longitude = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | burial_facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | artifacts = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_designation = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | label = Tanokuchi Kofun | icon = | label_position = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is designated as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. Artifacts found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was designated as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | latitude = 33.0158 | longitude = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | burial_facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | artifacts = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | label = Tanokuchi Kofun | icon = | label_position = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is designated as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. Artifacts found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was designated as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | latitude = 33.0158 | longitude = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | burial_facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | label = Tanokuchi Kofun | icon = | label_position = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | burial_facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | label_position = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_other_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is other_designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was other_designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_other_designation in 1953. At the time of other_designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_other_designation === * other_other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_other_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is other_designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was other_designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of other_designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation [[Category:kk]][[Category:11]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:11]][[Category:kk]][[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | size = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_other_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is other_designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was other_designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of other_designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation [[Category:kk]][[Category:11]][[Category:kk]][[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:kk]][[Category:11]][[Category:kk]][[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_other_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is other_designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was other_designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of other_designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]other_designation Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_other_designation = Kōchi Prefectural other_designation "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is other_designation1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was other_designation1 as a Kōchi Prefectural other_designation in 1953. At the time of other_designation, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == other_designation == === Kōchi Prefectural other_designation === * other_designation ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * other_designation Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones[[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view

In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation {{Kofun navbar}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New2]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]]

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation {{Kofun navbar}} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New2]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]]

Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:kk]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]] {{Kofun navbar}}

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]] {{Kofun navbar}}

{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi revision.comment: Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "Burial Facility"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox ancient site | name = Tanokuchi Kofun | image = [[File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-1.jpg|280px]]
Remaining stone chamber | alternate_name = Tanokuchi Kofun | affiliation = | location = {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]]Historic Site Explanation Board. | coordinates = 33.0158 | coordinates = 132.9924 | type = Unknown (possibly a {{ill|circular tumulus|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}}) | area = | built = Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}} | Burial Facility = {{ill|Yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}} | deceased = | burial goods = Agate magatama, {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}} | historical_site_Historic Site = Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site "Tanokuchi Kofun" | map = Japan Kochi | map_dot_label = Tanokuchi Kofun | type = | map_dot_label = top }} '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' (田ノ口古墳, also known as 田の口古墳) is an ancient {{ill|kofun|ja|古墳|1=Kofun|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Kuroshio, Kōchi|ja|黒潮町|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Hata District, Kōchi|ja|幡多郡|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Kōchi Prefecture]], Japan. It is Historic Site1 as a historic site by Kōchi Prefecture. == Overview == The kofun is situated on the mid-slope of a small hill on the left bank of the Kakise River in western Kōchi Prefecture. It was discovered in 1907 during land clearing activities, but much of the mound and the stone chamber were destroyed, leaving the full details of the structure unclear. While the tumulus type is uncertain, some suggest it might have been circular. The burial facility is a {{ill|yokoana-style stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=draft|12=draft}}, opening southwest toward the direction of Hatayama Shrine across the Kakise River. The entrance passage has been destroyed, leaving only part of the burial chamber intact. The chamber measures 1.63 meters in depth, 1.25 meters in central width, and 1.38 meters in entrance width. burial goods found at the site include an agate {{ill|magatama|ja|勾玉|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Sue pottery|ja|須恵器|1=Sue pottery|12=draft|12=draft}}, suggesting a construction period in the late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}. The site was Historic Site1 as a Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site in 1953. At the time of Historic Site, it was considered the only yokoana-style kofun in the Hata District. However, similar chambers have since been discovered, including at the {{ill|Furutsuka Kofun|ja|古津賀古墳|12=draft|12=draft}} in {{ill|Shimanto, Kōchi|ja|四万十市|12=draft|12=draft}}. File:Tanokuchi Kofun, enkei.jpg|Distant view
{{small|The stone chamber is visible in the center. In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft|12=draft}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]]

In the foreground are National Route 56 and Tanokuchi Elementary School on the far left.}} File:Tanokuchi Kofun, sekishitsu-2.jpg|Interior of the burial chamber == Historic Site == === Kōchi Prefectural Historic Site === * Historic Site ''' '''Tanokuchi Kofun''' – Designated on January 29, 1953.[http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] (Kōchi Prefectural website). == References == {{reflist}} == Further Reading == * Historic Site Explanation Board (installed by Kuroshio Town Board of Education) * {{Cite book|editor=|author=|year=1983|chapter=田の口古墳|title={{ill|Historical and Geographical Encyclopedia of Kōchi Prefecture|ja|日本歴史地名大系|12=draft|12=draft}} 40 Kōchi Prefecture|publisher={{ill|Heibonsha|ja|平凡社|12=draft|12=draft}}|isbn=4582490409|ref={{Harv|田の口古墳（平凡社）|1983}}}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Tanokuchi Kofun}} * [http://www.kochinet.ed.jp/bunkazai/details/410-2/410-2-31.htm Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kōchi Prefectural Website * [http://www.town.kuroshio.lg.jp/pb/cont/kuronavi-asobu/4142 Tanokuchi Kofun] – Kuroshio Town Tourism Intypeation {{draft categories| }} {{Kofun navbar}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Kofun in Kōchi Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Kuroshio, Kōchi]] [[Category:Kōchi Prefectural Historic Sites]] [[Category:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[Category:Fixed Kofun templates]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Tanokuchi Kofun]] [[ja:田ノ口古墳]]
